executives.name: Gary Roughead
executives.background: Admiral, U.S. Navy (Retired); former Chief of Naval Operations.

executives.name: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson
executives.background: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson has been a member of the Board since December 2018. She was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Human Resources Officer of Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.

executives.name: Lanesha Minnix
executives.background: Ms. Minnix has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since June 2023. Prior to joining Flowserve, she served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Ecolab Inc. from March 2022 to June 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Global Chief Legal Officer

board_of_directors.background: Admiral, U.S. Navy (Retired); former Chief of Naval Operations.
